issue_title: MultiDirectional optimzation loops forver if started at the correct solution
issue_description:
MultiDirectional.iterateSimplex loops forever if the starting point is the correct solution.
see the attached test case (testMultiDirectionalCorrectStart) as an example.

org.apache.commons.math.optimization.dir.error_msg:

buggy_code_comment:
/** Build a multi-directional optimizer with specified coefficients.
* @param khi expansion coefficient
* @param gamma contraction coefficient
*/
